['2 each lemongrass whole stalks', '2 teaspoons laos powder', '1 can coconut milk', '1 pound tofu firm, diced', '1/2 cup miso paste white', '1 each hot chili peppers seeded, sliced into thin rounds', '1 each limes juiced', '2 tablespoons basil fresh, and or mint (finely chopped)', '1 tablespoon fish sauce optional, nam pla', '1 x coriander fresh, as garnish']

Directions:
['chop lemongrass, and bruise it with the flat of a cleaver.', 'add laos powder and lemongrass to coconut milk, and slowly bring to a boil while stirring gently.', 'simmer for 10 minutes.', 'strain off lemongrass.', 'add tofu, stirring into stock.', 'remove 2 cups of stock.', 'dissolve miso in it, and return to pot.', 'simmer for 5 minutes.', 'add tofu, stirring into stock.', 'remove 2 cups of stock.', 'dissolve miso in it, and return to pot.', 'simmer for 5 minutes.', 'add remaining ingredients, and serve garnished with coriander.', 'this is delicious with a bowl of thai jasmine rice.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is sesame-free, egg-free, honey-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 1/2 lb. boneless skinless chicken breast', '2 c. italian flavored bread crumbs', '1/2 c. milk', '3 tbsp. olive oil']
output:
chicken nuggets

Ingredients:
['1 1/2 lb. boneless skinless chicken breast', '2 c. italian flavored bread crumbs', '1/2 c. milk', '3 tbsp. olive oil']

Directions:
['cube chicken breast.', 'dip in milk, coat with flavored bread crumbs.', 'cook over medium heat for 11 to 14 minutes.', 'serve with rice, french fries or baked potatoes.', 'serves 4.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is dairy-free, soy-free. Use these ingredients: ['2 lbs lean ground beef', '1 egg', '1 (3 ounce) packet onion soup mix', '4 tablespoons steak sauce (like a1)', '1 tablespoon minced garlic', '1/2 cup hot water', '3/4 cup oatmeal', '1/2 teaspoon basil', '1 loaf french bread, loaf (on the thinner side)', '2 links smoked sausage', '20 bacon, strips']
output:
bacon wrapped heart attack "meatloaf"

Ingredients:
['2 lbs lean ground beef', '1 egg', '1 (3 ounce) packet onion soup mix', '4 tablespoons steak sauce (like a1)', '1 tablespoon minced garlic', '1/2 cup hot water', '3/4 cup oatmeal', '1/2 teaspoon basil', '1 loaf french bread, loaf (on the thinner side)', '2 links smoked sausage', '20 bacon, strips']

Directions:
["cut your french bread loaf in half (depending on its size of course -- you want it to be about 6 inches long). hollow out about half of the middle, as far as you can (see my picture -- you want it to have a layer of bread still all the way around so don't overdo it). stuff the smoked sausage into it, trimming it to be even with the bread. repeat with second half of bread.", 'mix ground beef thru basil. take half and flatten into a square onto a cookie sheet. put the bread/sausage on top and wrap the meatloaf mixture around it completely.', "on a plate or cutting board take 10 strips of bacon and weave them together. wrap them around the meatloaf -- sometimes they won't reach all the way and that's fine, just keep the pretty woven part on top and hide the ends on the bottom. repeat with other 10 strips and loaf.", 'cook on cookie sheet at 375 for 45 minutes (or till done).']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is soy-free, peanut-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 pkg. cake mix (white, yellow or lemon)', '1 pkg. lemon jello', '3/4 c. water', '4 eggs', '1/2 c. salad oil', '2 c. powdered sugar', '1/2 c. real lemon juice']
output:
lemon cake

Ingredients:
['1 pkg. cake mix (white, yellow or lemon)', '1 pkg. lemon jello', '3/4 c. water', '4 eggs', '1/2 c. salad oil', '2 c. powdered sugar', '1/2 c. real lemon juice']

Directions:
['mix cake mix, jello, water and eggs for 3 minutes.', 'add oil and mix for 1 minute.', 'bake at 350° for 35 to 45 minutes.', 'punch holes with fork in top of cake.', 'while hot, combine powdered sugar and lemon juice and dribble over top.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is low-carb, dairy-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 1/2 lb. crabmeat', '4 tbsp. mayonnaise', '1 lb. uncooked macaroni', '2 tbsp. sweet pickle relish', '1 can drained peas', '3 eggs', '2 stalks finely chopped celery']
output:
seafood salad

Ingredients:
['1 1/2 lb. crabmeat', '4 tbsp. mayonnaise', '1 lb. uncooked macaroni', '2 tbsp. sweet pickle relish', '1 can drained peas', '3 eggs', '2 stalks finely chopped celery']

Directions:
['hard-boil eggs and cook macaroni noodles.', 'in a large serving bowl, combine celery, peas and mayonnaise.', 'chunk crabmeat (imitation crab will do) into bowl.', 'peel eggs and let cool.', 'boil macaroni for 8 to 9 minutes.', 'drain and rinse with cold water; drain again.', 'chop eggs and add eggs and macaroni with crabmeat mixture.', 'add relish and stir thoroughly.', 'if desired, serve immediately or refrigerate for several hours before serving.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is fish-free, shellfish-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 c. raspberries', '3 c. white vinegar', '1/3 c. sugar']
output:
raspberry vinegar

Ingredients:
['1 c. raspberries', '3 c. white vinegar', '1/3 c. sugar']

Directions:
['heat, but do not boil, the vinegar.', 'add sugar.', 'dissolve the sugar in hot vinegar.', 'place berries in jar or bottle and pour warm vinegar over the berries.', 'before capping, allow the liquid to cool to room temperature.', 'fix top tightly and place in sunny window spot for 1 to 2 weeks.', 'store in cool place.', 'as the berries soften and loose their shape, strain and rebottle the vinegar.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is sugar-free, beef-free, soy-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 lb lean ground turkey', '4 bell peppers (any color)', '3 clove garlic', '1/2 onion', '1/2 cup mozzarella cheese', '1 jar of prego spaghetti sauce', '1 tbsp olive oil', '1 sage', '1 salt & pepper', '1 rosemary or any spices you prefer!']
output:
healthy & delicious stuffed peppers

Ingredients:
['1 lb lean ground turkey', '4 bell peppers (any color)', '3 clove garlic', '1/2 onion', '1/2 cup mozzarella cheese', '1 jar of prego spaghetti sauce', '1 tbsp olive oil', '1 sage', '1 salt & pepper', '1 rosemary or any spices you prefer!']

Directions:
['wash bell peppers, cut off tops (save them to dice up and add inside the peppers!)', '& stem, and remove seeds/stem from inside.', '(if your peppers have a rounded bottom that makes them difficult to stand upright, slice just a little off the bottom just to make them have a flat bottom)', 'boil a large pot of water and have a bowl of ice water ready to blanch the peppers.', 'boil for 1-2 minutes (longer for softer peppers, shorter for more crisp peppers).', 'remove peppers and place in ice water to stop them from continuing to cook.', 'after about a minute, remove peppers and place them standing up in a casserole dish.', 'use a paper towel to remove any excess water.', 'dice up garlic, onions, and the tops of the peppers.', 'saute with the olive oil for about 5 minutes.', 'remove from pan and set aside.', 'pan fry the turkey, while breaking it into small pieces, with sage, salt, pepper, and any other spices you may like.', 'once it is browned (about 7 minutes), remove and combine with the garlic, onions, and peppers.', 'add about half of the jar of spaghetti sauce to the mixture and mix evenly.', 'scoop the mixture into the bell peppers.', 'pour remaining sauce on top and around the peppers.', 'bake at 350f for 20-25 minutes.', 'divide and sprinkle the mozzarella cheese on top of the peppers and continue baking for 5 minutes, or until cheese is melted.', 'add rosemary (or any other spice) on top of cheese, and let peppers cool for about 10 to 15 minutes.', 'serve with garlic bread and enjoy!']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is pork-free, processed-meat-free. Use these ingredients: ['2 cups chocolate wafer cookies, crumbled', '6 tablespoons butter, melted', '6 tablespoons powdered sugar', '14 ounces sweetened condensed milk', '3 34 cups sweetened flaked coconut', '1 cup sliced almonds, toasted', '1 cup semi-sweet chocolate chips', '14 cup whipping cream', '12 cup white chocolate chips']
output:
chocolate almond macaroon bars

Ingredients:
['2 cups chocolate wafer cookies, crumbled', '6 tablespoons butter, melted', '6 tablespoons powdered sugar', '14 ounces sweetened condensed milk', '3 34 cups sweetened flaked coconut', '1 cup sliced almonds, toasted', '1 cup semi-sweet chocolate chips', '14 cup whipping cream', '12 cup white chocolate chips']

Directions:
['heat oven to 350 degrees.', 'grease a 13 x 9 baking pan.', 'combine cookie crumbs, melted butter and sugar; firmly press mixture on bottom of prepared pan.', 'stir together sweetened condensed milk, coconut and almonds; mix well.', 'carefully drop mixture by spoonfuls over crust; spread evenly.', 'bake 20-25 minutes or until coconut edges just begin to brown.', 'cool.', 'place semi-sweet chocolate chips and whipping cream in a medium microwave-safe bowl.', 'microwave on high (100%) 1 minute; stir.', 'if necessary, microwave at high an additional 10 seconds at a time, stirring after each heating, until chips are melted and mixture is smooth when stirred.', 'cool until slightly thickened; spread over cooled bars.', 'sprinkle top with white chips.', 'cover; refrigerate several hours or until thoroughly chilled.', 'cut into bars.', 'refrigerate leftovers.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is sugar-free, low-carb, gluten-free. Use these ingredients: ['beef/smoked turkey/chicken', '1 c. chopped onion', '1 tbsp. oregano', '1 tbsp. dill seed powder', '1 can tomato sauce/paste', 'enough water to fill pot', '1 c. chopped green pepper', '1 tbsp. ginger powder', '1 tbsp. celery powder', '2 to 3 tbsp. peanut butter']
output:
peanut soup

Ingredients:
['beef/smoked turkey/chicken', '1 c. chopped onion', '1 tbsp. oregano', '1 tbsp. dill seed powder', '1 can tomato sauce/paste', 'enough water to fill pot', '1 c. chopped green pepper', '1 tbsp. ginger powder', '1 tbsp. celery powder', '2 to 3 tbsp. peanut butter']

Directions:
['cut beef, smoked turkey or chicken (you may use all 3 if you desire) into manageable sizes; boil.', 'add chopped onion and green pepper.', 'add tablespoon of oregano, ginger powder, dill seed powder, celery powder, a can of tomato paste or sauce and 2 to 3 tablespoons of peanut butter.', 'boil all of these ingredients for about an hour or two.', 'serve over rice, potatoes, grits or bread.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is shellfish-free, nut-free, soy-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 large onion', '1/4 c. olive oil or butter', '2 to 3 large potatoes', 'milk', '2 stalks celery', '1 pt. half and half', '4 c. chicken broth']
output:
potato soup

Ingredients:
['1 large onion', '1/4 c. olive oil or butter', '2 to 3 large potatoes', 'milk', '2 stalks celery', '1 pt. half and half', '4 c. chicken broth']

Directions:
['saute onion and celery in oil until soft (do not brown).', 'peel and cook potatoes (cut in small cubes).', 'add chicken broth and potatoes to onion and celery; simmer.', 'just before serving, add half and half and milk to taste.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is legume-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 lb. italian sausage', '6 slices bread', '1 heaping cup cheddar cheese - shredded', '6 eggs', '2 c. milk', '1 tsp. dry mustard']
output:
sausage bake

Ingredients:
['1 lb. italian sausage', '6 slices bread', '1 heaping cup cheddar cheese - shredded', '6 eggs', '2 c. milk', '1 tsp. dry mustard']

Directions:
['saute sausage and drain.', 'tear bread into pieces and place in 13 x 9 inch baking dish. cover with sausage and cheese.', 'beat eggs with milk and mustard.', 'pour over sausage and cheese.', 'cover and refrigerate overnight.', 'next morning, place in cold oven and turn oven to 350°.', 'bake for 45 minutes.', 'do not cover.', 'this is delicious for a sunday morning breakfast.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is low-carb. Use these ingredients: ['1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, softened', '1 tbsp. grated onion', '1 tsp. horseradish', 'dash of worcestershire sauce', '1 (4 oz.) pkg. smoked sliced beef or ham']
output:
pinwheels

Ingredients:
['1 (8 oz.) pkg. cream cheese, softened', '1 tbsp. grated onion', '1 tsp. horseradish', 'dash of worcestershire sauce', '1 (4 oz.) pkg. smoked sliced beef or ham']

Directions:
['blend cream cheese, onion, worcestershire sauce and horseradish until smooth.', 'lay out 5 slices of meat, slightly overlapping on 18 inch piece of aluminum foil.', 'lay out 2 more rows to form rectangle.', 'spread with mixture and roll up as for jelly roll. chill.', 'before serving, slice into one inch slices.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is dairy-free, sugar-free, sesame-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 1/2 lb. almond bark', '12 oz. chocolate chips', '2 squares unsweetened chocolate', '24 oz. unsalted cocktail peanuts']
output:
peanut clusters

Ingredients:
['1 1/2 lb. almond bark', '12 oz. chocolate chips', '2 squares unsweetened chocolate', '24 oz. unsalted cocktail peanuts']

Directions:
['melt in crock pot almond bark, chocolate chips, unsweetened chocolate. add peanuts and stir until ingredients are melted and cover peanuts. drop in mounds onto wax paper.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is legume-free. Use these ingredients: ['5 tbsp. flour', '4 lb. chicken sections', '4 tbsp. butter', '2 c. red wine', '2/3 c. brandy', '2 small cans mushrooms', '1/2 tsp. thyme', '1 c. sliced onions']
output:
chicken in wine

Ingredients:
['5 tbsp. flour', '4 lb. chicken sections', '4 tbsp. butter', '2 c. red wine', '2/3 c. brandy', '2 small cans mushrooms', '1/2 tsp. thyme', '1 c. sliced onions']

Directions:
['fry floured chicken in butter until browned.', 'add the rest of the ingredients; simmer, covered, for 1 hour.', 'makes 6 to 8 servings.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is chicken-free, sesame-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 medium cabbage', '2 eggs', '1 stick butter', '1 c. milk', '1 c. bread crumbs', '1 c. grated cheese', '1 tsp. salt and pepper']
output:
cabbage casserole

Ingredients:
['1 medium cabbage', '2 eggs', '1 stick butter', '1 c. milk', '1 c. bread crumbs', '1 c. grated cheese', '1 tsp. salt and pepper']

Directions:
['cook cabbage for 10 minutes.', 'drain.', 'mix eggs, butter and milk together.', 'place cabbage in greased casserole dish.', 'pour ingredients over the cabbage.', 'add the cheese, then the bread crumbs over the top of all.', 'bake in oven for 30 minutes at 350°.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is sesame-free, beef-free. Use these ingredients: ['for the crust:', '2-1/2 cups original oreos (about 30 cookies)', '6 tablespoons unsalted butter, melted', 'for the filling:', '24 ounces, weight cream cheese, softened', '3/4 cups heavy whipping cream', '3/4 cups sugar', '1 tablespoon vanilla extract', '1/2 teaspoons salt', '2 cups nutella', '4 large eggs, lightly beaten', 'for the glaze:', '1/2 cups heavy whipping cream', '1 cup nutella']
output:
the best nutella new york cheesecake ever

Ingredients:
['for the crust:', '2-1/2 cups original oreos (about 30 cookies)', '6 tablespoons unsalted butter, melted', 'for the filling:', '24 ounces, weight cream cheese, softened', '3/4 cups heavy whipping cream', '3/4 cups sugar', '1 tablespoon vanilla extract', '1/2 teaspoons salt', '2 cups nutella', '4 large eggs, lightly beaten', 'for the glaze:', '1/2 cups heavy whipping cream', '1 cup nutella']

Directions:
['note: you must follow every step precisely!', 'for the crust:', 'adjust oven rack to the lower third position and preheat oven to 350°f. wrap the outer bottom of a 9-inch springform pan tightly with aluminum foil. combine the cookie crumbs and melted butter. press the crumb mixture into the bottom and about 2 inches up the sides of the pan. bake for 10 minutes. set aside to cool while you make the filling.', 'for the filling:', 'reduce oven temperature to 300°f.', 'in a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese, heavy cream, and sugar with an electric mixer until smooth and fluffy. add vanilla and salt, beat on low speed until smooth. add nutella and beat until well incorporated. scrape down the sides of the bowl as needed. using a silicone spatula, gently stir in the eggs just until combined.', 'pour batter over the crust in the prepared pan. place cheesecake inside a roasting pan. fill the roasting pan with enough hot water to reach halfway up the sides of the cheesecake pan. (alternatively, you can place the roasting pan filled with water on the lower rack of the oven.)', 'bake for 1 hour. turn oven off, leave cheesecake in the water bath in the oven for another hour. the outer edges of the cheesecake should feel firm to the touch while the center remains jiggly.', 'remove cheesecake from the water bath and run a small knife around the outer edge of the cheesecake to loosen it from the pan. allow it to cool completely to room temperature. (the cheesecake should not feel the slightest bit warm.) refrigerate the cheesecake overnight.', 'for the glaze:', 'remove the sides of the pan and place the cheesecake on a wire rack set over a baking sheet.', 'bring cream to a low boil over medium-low heat. pour the warm cream over the nutella in a medium bowl and stir to combine.', 'pour the glaze over the top of the cheesecake and use an offset spatula to smooth it over, allowing the glaze to run over the edge and down the sides of the cheesecake. refrigerate for at least 1 hour or until the glaze has set.', 'make ahead tip: the baked and chilled cheesecake will keep for up to 4 days covered tightly and stored in the refrigerator.', 'the cheesecake will keep for up to 2 months covered tightly and stored in the freezer. cut frozen and let the slices sit at room temperature for 15-30 minutes before serving.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is legume-free, soy-free. Use these ingredients: ['2 c. pasta, cooked', 'cherry tomatoes, cut in half', 'green onions, chopped', '1 cucumber, diced', '1 green pepper, diced', '1 small can sliced black olives, drained', '2 c. grated cheddar cheese', 'salt & pepper to taste', '8 oz. bottle italian dressing (the kind that stays blended in the bottle)']
output:
pasta salad

Ingredients:
['2 c. pasta, cooked', 'cherry tomatoes, cut in half', 'green onions, chopped', '1 cucumber, diced', '1 green pepper, diced', '1 small can sliced black olives, drained', '2 c. grated cheddar cheese', 'salt & pepper to taste', '8 oz. bottle italian dressing (the kind that stays blended in the bottle)']

Directions:
['cook pasta per instructions and when done, rinse under cold water.', 'mix all ingredients until well blended.', 'chill 2-3 hours before serving.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is fish-free, nut-free, honey-free. Use these ingredients: ['3/4 c. plain yogurt', '1/2 c. diced seedless cucumber', '1/2 c. chopped tomato', '1/2 c. chopped radishes', '2 tbsp. chopped fresh mint', '1/2 tsp. ground cumin', '1/4 tsp. salt', '1/4 c. plain yogurt', '1/4 c. buttermilk or ranch dressing', '1/4 tsp. ground cumin', '1/4 tsp. chili powder', '1/4 tsp. salt', '4 thin-sliced chicken breast cutlets', 'tomato couscous']
output:
tandoori chicken skewers

Ingredients:
['3/4 c. plain yogurt', '1/2 c. diced seedless cucumber', '1/2 c. chopped tomato', '1/2 c. chopped radishes', '2 tbsp. chopped fresh mint', '1/2 tsp. ground cumin', '1/4 tsp. salt', '1/4 c. plain yogurt', '1/4 c. buttermilk or ranch dressing', '1/4 tsp. ground cumin', '1/4 tsp. chili powder', '1/4 tsp. salt', '4 thin-sliced chicken breast cutlets', 'tomato couscous']

Directions:
['line a broiler pan with nonstick foil; heat broiler.', 'prepare tomato-cucumber sauce: in a small bowl, combine all ingredients.', 'prepare basting sauce: in a small bowl, combine all ingredients.', 'prepare tandoori chicken: thread chicken on 6-inch metal skewers.', 'brush with basting sauce and broil 4 inches from the heat for 2 to 3 minutes.', 'turn, baste again, and broil 2 to 3 minutes longer.', 'serve with tomato-cucumber sauce and tomato couscous, if desired.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is beef-free. Use these ingredients: ['46 fluid ounces apricot nectar', '3 (3 ounce) packages apricot-flavored gelatin (such as jell-o(r)', '1/2 cup whipped cream, or to taste']
output:
apricot jell-o®

Ingredients:
['46 fluid ounces apricot nectar', '3 (3 ounce) packages apricot-flavored gelatin (such as jell-o(r)', '1/2 cup whipped cream, or to taste']

Directions:
['bring apricot nectar to a rolling boil in a saucepan; remove from heat. stir apricot-flavored gelatin into nectar until dissolved. pour gelatin mixture into a serving bowl and refrigerate until set, 8 hours to overnight. top dessert with whipped cream about 2 hours before serving.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is nut-free, peanut-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 to 2 cloves garlic', '1/4 c. water', '2 tbsp. lemon juice', '1 tbsp. olive or vegetable oil', '1/2 tsp. salt', '1 can drained chickpeas (garbanzo beans)', '1/4 c. tahini (sesame butter) *', 'chopped parsley or mint']
output:
hummus(middle eastern chickpea dip)

Ingredients:
['1 to 2 cloves garlic', '1/4 c. water', '2 tbsp. lemon juice', '1 tbsp. olive or vegetable oil', '1/2 tsp. salt', '1 can drained chickpeas (garbanzo beans)', '1/4 c. tahini (sesame butter) *', 'chopped parsley or mint']

Directions:
['blend garlic, water, lemon juice, oil and salt in blender. add chickpeas and blend until smooth.', 'add tahini and blend; the mixture should have the consistency of thick mayonnaise.', 'if too thick, add a little water.', 'garnish with parsley or mint leaves and serve with wedges of pita bread.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is beef-free, sugar-free. Use these ingredients: ['40 medium green asparagus spears (about 2 pounds), trimmed to about 5 inchesand peeled, plus tips only of 4 medium asparagus spears, coarsely chopped', '1 tablespoon fine sea salt', '6 tablespoons unsalted butter', '1/2 cup freshly grated parmigiano-reggiano cheese', 'freshly ground black pepper', '4 teaspoons fruity extra-virgin olive oil, chilled']
output:
glazed cooked and raw asparagus with butter and parmesan

Ingredients:
['40 medium green asparagus spears (about 2 pounds), trimmed to about 5 inchesand peeled, plus tips only of 4 medium asparagus spears, coarsely chopped', '1 tablespoon fine sea salt', '6 tablespoons unsalted butter', '1/2 cup freshly grated parmigiano-reggiano cheese', 'freshly ground black pepper', '4 teaspoons fruity extra-virgin olive oil, chilled']

Directions:
['to cook the asparagus: using kitchen string, tie the asparagus spears together in bunches of five.', 'bring a large pot of water, with the salt, to a rapid boil.', 'plunge in the asparagus bunches and cook until the tip of a knife can pierce a stalk without resistance, about 4 minutes.', 'remove the asparagus and pat the bunches dry, then carefully untie the strings.', 'melt 3 tablespoons of butter in each of two large skillets over medium heat (if you have just one large frying pan, cook in two batches).', 'when the butter is white and bubbly, lay the asparagus in the pans in a single layer.', 'roll the stalks around so that each gets well covered with butter and cook for 2 minutes or so, until they take on a shiny, "gilded" look.', 'sprinkle on the parmesan and remove from the heat.', 'to finish the dish: divide the asparagus among four warmed serving dishes, then scatter the chopped asparagus tips over the cooked asparagus.', 'sprinkle a pinch of freshly ground pepper over each serving, then drizzle 1 teaspoon of chilled olive oil in a thin filament around the edge of each plate.', 'serve immediately.', 'variations: instead of drizzling olive oil onto the serving plates, substitute a thin filament of highly reduced pan drippings from a roast, punctuated around each plate by 6 tiny nicoise olives.', 'or garnish each plate with 4 fresh morel mushrooms that have been sauteed in butter with minced shallots.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is shellfish-free, sesame-free. Use these ingredients: ['2 tablespoons olive oil (preferably extra-virgin)', '2 1/2 cups chopped red onions (about 2 medium)', '1 ounce finely chopped smoked ham (scant 1/4 cup)', '4 tablespoons chopped fresh thyme or 1 1/2 tablespoons dried', '3 large bay leaves', '8 ounces skinless boneless chicken thighs, fat trimmed, cut into 1-inch pieces', '3 cups frozen baby lima beans (about 1 pound)', '1 16-ounce can italian-style tomatoes, cut into pieces, juices reserved', '6 garlic cloves, minced']
output:
lima bean paella

Ingredients:
['2 tablespoons olive oil (preferably extra-virgin)', '2 1/2 cups chopped red onions (about 2 medium)', '1 ounce finely chopped smoked ham (scant 1/4 cup)', '4 tablespoons chopped fresh thyme or 1 1/2 tablespoons dried', '3 large bay leaves', '8 ounces skinless boneless chicken thighs, fat trimmed, cut into 1-inch pieces', '3 cups frozen baby lima beans (about 1 pound)', '1 16-ounce can italian-style tomatoes, cut into pieces, juices reserved', '6 garlic cloves, minced']

Directions:
['heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.', 'add 2 1/2 cups chopped red onions, 1 ounce finely chopped smoked ham, 3 tablespoons chopped fresh thyme and bay leaves and saute until onions are tender and golden, about 8 minutes.', 'add chicken pieces, 3 cups baby lima beans, italian-style tomatoes with their juices and minced garlic cloves and bring mixture to boil.', 'reduce heat to medium-low, cover and simmer until chicken pieces are cooked through and lima beans are tender, about 25 minutes.', 'discard bay leaves.', 'season mixture to taste with salt and pepper.', 'transfer paella to large serving bowl.', 'sprinkle with remaining 1 tablespoon chopped fresh thyme and serve.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is alcohol-free, shellfish-free, processed-meat-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 1/2 c. (3 sticks) butter, softened', '6 eggs', '1 1/2 c. sugar', '2 c. cake flour', '1 pkg. double dutch fudge buttercream frosting mix', '2 c. chopped pecans or walnuts']
output:
tunnel of fudge cake

Ingredients:
['1 1/2 c. (3 sticks) butter, softened', '6 eggs', '1 1/2 c. sugar', '2 c. cake flour', '1 pkg. double dutch fudge buttercream frosting mix', '2 c. chopped pecans or walnuts']

Directions:
['in a large bowl, cream butter; add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.', 'gradually add sugar, continue creaming at high speed until light and fluffy.', 'by hand, stir in flour, frosting mix and nuts until well blended.', 'pour batter into greased bundt pan.', 'bake in preheated moderate oven (350°) for 60 to 65 minutes.', 'since cake has a soft, fudgy interior, test for doneness after 60 minutes by observing dry, shiny brownie-type crust.', 'when cake is done, cool in pan 2 hours, then remove from pan and cool completely before serving.', 'this cake is delicious plain or with an old fashioned icing.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is chicken-free, beef-free, legume-free. Use these ingredients: ['pasta', '1/2 cup (4 oz.) salted butter', '1/2 cup (2 oz.) all-purpose flour', '2 teaspoons dry mustard', '1 teaspoon table salt', '1/2 teaspoon black pepper', '1/4 teaspoon cayenne pepper', '2 cups half-and-half', '2 cups whole milk', '1 (16-oz.) block swiss cheese, shredded', '2 ounces parmesan cheese, shredded (about 2/3 cup)', '1 (16-oz.) pkg. farfalle (bow-tie pasta), prepared according to pkg. directions', '1 (12-oz.) pkg. cubed boneless ham (about 2 cups)', '1 1/2 cups frozen baby sweet peas, thawed', 'topping', '1 cup sea salt-and-pepper croutons', '2 ounces parmesan cheese, shredded (about 2/3 cup)', '1 tablespoon butter, melted']
output:
creamy spring pasta bake (julia's pasta bake)

Ingredients:
['pasta', '1/2 cup (4 oz.) salted butter', '1/2 cup (2 oz.) all-purpose flour', '2 teaspoons dry mustard', '1 teaspoon table salt', '1/2 teaspoon black pepper', '1/4 teaspoon cayenne pepper', '2 cups half-and-half', '2 cups whole milk', '1 (16-oz.) block swiss cheese, shredded', '2 ounces parmesan cheese, shredded (about 2/3 cup)', '1 (16-oz.) pkg. farfalle (bow-tie pasta), prepared according to pkg. directions', '1 (12-oz.) pkg. cubed boneless ham (about 2 cups)', '1 1/2 cups frozen baby sweet peas, thawed', 'topping', '1 cup sea salt-and-pepper croutons', '2 ounces parmesan cheese, shredded (about 2/3 cup)', '1 tablespoon butter, melted']

Directions:
['preheat oven to 350°f. melt butter in a dutch oven over medium. gradually whisk in flour until smooth; cook, whisking constantly, 2 minutes. whisk in dry mustard, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper. gradually whisk in half-and-half and milk; cook, whisking constantly, until thickened, 8 to 10 minutes.', 'whisk in swiss cheese and 2 oz. parmesan cheese. remove from heat. stir in pasta, ham, and peas. pour mixture into a lightly greased 13- x 9-inch baking dish.', 'prepare topping: process croutons and 2 oz. parmesan cheese in a food processor until finely ground. add 1 tablespoon melted butter, and process until combined. sprinkle over pasta mixture.', 'bake in preheated oven until golden, about 30 minutes. let stand 10 minutes.', 'we tested with hormel cure 81 premium cubed boneless ham and new york texas toast sea salt and pepper croutons.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is egg-free, soy-free. Use these ingredients: ['500 g tagliatelle pasta noodles', '1 roasting chicken', '1 onion, sliced', '1 tablespoon parsley', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon pepper', '2 liters water', '1 tablespoon oil', '1 garlic clove, finely diced', '1 onion, diced', '1 red bell pepper, finely diced', '200 g sliced mushrooms', '1/2 teaspoon fresh ground pepper', '1 tablespoon plain flour', '1 tablespoon butter', '1/2 cup milk (i use low fat)', '200 g grated low-fat cheddar cheese', '50 g grated parmesan cheese', '1 teaspoon grainy mustard']
output:
baked chicken tagliatelle with mushrooms and peppers

Ingredients:
['500 g tagliatelle pasta noodles', '1 roasting chicken', '1 onion, sliced', '1 tablespoon parsley', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon pepper', '2 liters water', '1 tablespoon oil', '1 garlic clove, finely diced', '1 onion, diced', '1 red bell pepper, finely diced', '200 g sliced mushrooms', '1/2 teaspoon fresh ground pepper', '1 tablespoon plain flour', '1 tablespoon butter', '1/2 cup milk (i use low fat)', '200 g grated low-fat cheddar cheese', '50 g grated parmesan cheese', '1 teaspoon grainy mustard']

Directions:
['fill a large saucepan with water. add the chicken, sliced onion, parsley, salt and pepper. cook over moderate heat until water is boiling, reduce heat and simmer for about 40 minutes until the chicken is cooked through. allow the chicken to cool slightly (about 10 minutes) in the water. remove the chicken and when cool enough to handle, remove all flesh from the bones. set to one side. drain and reserve the stock that the chicken has been cooking in to make the sauce.', 'while the chicken is cooking, cook the tagliatelle to packet instructions, drain and place is large, shallow baking dish. turn on oven - moderate heat.', 'for the mushroom mixture, cook the diced onion in the oil, after about 4 mins add the garlic, mushrooms and capsicum. cook for a further 3 minutes, then add the garlic and pepper. cook for a further minute. remove from heat.', 'add the chicken and mushroom mixture to the tagliatelle.', 'to make the sauce, add the butter to a small saucepan, melt and then add flour. mix, then add the milk and mustard. stir a then let simmer and thicken. when starting to thicken, add some of the reserved stock. keep simmering for a further 5 minutes, or until the sauce is thickened. add half the cheddar cheese mixture to the sauce to thicken more.', 'pour the sauce over the tagliatelle/chicken/mushroom mixture. sprinkle the remaining cheddar cheese over the dish, and then top with parmesan.', 'cover with foil and place in a preheated moderate oven for about 40 minutes.', 'serve with salad and crusty bread.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is peanut-free, chicken-free. Use these ingredients: ['3 lb. caribou', 'oil', '3 medium onions', '5 carrots', 'pepper', '4 cloves garlic', 'flour', 'fat']
output:
caribou (modern)(huron)

['3 lb. caribou', 'oil', '3 medium onions', '5 carrots', 'pepper', '4 cloves garlic', 'flour', 'fat']

Directions:
['chop onions and carrots.', 'marinate meat 3 hours in a mixture of oil, vegetables and pepper.', 'turn meat every 30 minutes.', 'dry meat and insert slivered garlic into meat.', 'flour and place in roasting pan with fat.', 'roast at 500° for 30 to 40 minutes (rare) or 45 minutes (medium).']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is beef-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 cup water', '1 cup sugar', '1/2 cup thawed lemonade concentrate', '1/2 cup thawed orange juice concentrate', '4 cups watermelon balls or cubes', '2 cups cantaloupe balls or cubes', '2 cups honeydew balls or cubes', '2 cups pineapple chunks', '2 cups fresh raspberries']
output:
chilly melon cups

Ingredients:
['1 cup water', '1 cup sugar', '1/2 cup thawed lemonade concentrate', '1/2 cup thawed orange juice concentrate', '4 cups watermelon balls or cubes', '2 cups cantaloupe balls or cubes', '2 cups honeydew balls or cubes', '2 cups pineapple chunks', '2 cups fresh raspberries']

Directions:
['in a large bowl, combine the water, sugar and concentrates; stir until sugar is dissolved. add fruit and stir gently to coat. spoon into foil-lined muffin cups or 3-oz. plastic cups. freeze for up to 3 months.', 'before serving, thaw overnight in the refrigerator or let stand at room temperature for 30-45 minutes or until slushy.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is beef-free, shellfish-free, fish-free. Use these ingredients: ['4 bacon slices chopped', '1/2 onion thinly sliced', '1 tablespoon soy sauce', '1 tablespoon lime juice', '1/4 teaspoon worcestershire sauce', 'mayonnaise', '1 cup tortilla chips lightly crushed', 'cooking spray', '1 tablespoon lime chili-, powder', 'ketchup', 'mustard', 'hot dogs']
output:
spicy bacon hot dog

Ingredients:
['4 bacon slices chopped', '1/2 onion thinly sliced', '1 tablespoon soy sauce', '1 tablespoon lime juice', '1/4 teaspoon worcestershire sauce', 'mayonnaise', '1 cup tortilla chips lightly crushed', 'cooking spray', '1 tablespoon lime chili-, powder', 'ketchup', 'mustard', 'hot dogs']

Directions:
['pan-fried hot dog\n\ncook in a hot cast-iron skillet with a little oil, butter or bacon fat, about 5 minutes.', 'bacon and onions\n\ncook 4 chopped bacon slices in a skillet over medium-high heat until the fat has rendered, about 5 minutes. add 1/2 thinly sliced onion; cook, stirring, until translucent, about 3 minutes. stir in 1 tablespoon each soy sauce and lime juice and 1/4 teaspoon worcestershire sauce.', 'spicy chips\n\nspread 1 cup lightly crushed tortilla chips on a baking sheet and spray with cooking spray. sprinkle with 1 tablespoon chili-lime powder (such as tajen brand) and toss to coat. bake at 350 degrees f until lightly toasted, 4 to 5 minutes. let cool.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is sugar-free, processed-meat-free, shellfish-free. Use these ingredients: ['7 fresh or frozen phyllo pastry sheets, thawed', '1/4 cup melted butter', '2 tablespoons dijon mustard', '2 cups grated swiss cheese (recommended -- emmenthal)', '8 large ripe tomatoes, sliced 1/4-inch thick', 'coarse salt', 'fresh ground black pepper', '1 tablespoon fresh thyme leave', '12 fresh basil leaves, for garnish']
output:
tomato cheese tart

Ingredients:
['7 fresh or frozen phyllo pastry sheets, thawed', '1/4 cup melted butter', '2 tablespoons dijon mustard', '2 cups grated swiss cheese (recommended -- emmenthal)', '8 large ripe tomatoes, sliced 1/4-inch thick', 'coarse salt', 'fresh ground black pepper', '1 tablespoon fresh thyme leave', '12 fresh basil leaves, for garnish']

Directions:
['preheat oven to 400 degrees f.', 'on a large baking sheet, place 1 sheet filo pastry and brush with melted butter, repeat, stacking them on top of each other as you build your pie crust. you may want to stagger the sheets a little bit to ensure that the baking sheet is well covered allowing a little bit of an edge.', 'on the top layer, brush on the mustard. sprinkle the cheese evenly over the pastry to ensure even coverage. lay the tomato slices generously, all over, overlapping, as needed. season with coarse salt, and ground black pepper. sprinkle the thyme leaves on top.', 'bake in the oven until the pastry is crisped and browned at the edges, about 25 minutes. add another sprinkling of coarse salt, and cut the tart into 8 squares. garnish with fresh basil leaves. delicious when served hot, warm, or at room temperature.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is processed-meat-free, beef-free, nut-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 large egg, beaten', '4 tablespoons cornstarch', '1 tablespoon soy sauce', '1/4 cup soy sauce', '3 tablespoons mirin', '1 1/2 lbs boneless chicken, cut into 1-inch cubes', '1/4 cup rice vinegar', '1/4 cup sugar', '2 tablespoons hoisin sauce', '1 tablespoon chili paste with garlic', '10 black peppercorns, crushed', '2 teaspoons sesame oil', '2 -3 cups vegetable oil (for frying)', '5 hot chili peppers, cut in half', '1 (1 inch) knob fresh ginger, peeled and minced', '3 garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups broccoli florets', '1 red bell pepper, seeded and thinly sliced', '3 green onions, thinly sliced, for garnish', 'white rice, for serving']
output:
chinese take-out general tso's chicken

Ingredients:
['1 large egg, beaten', '4 tablespoons cornstarch', '1 tablespoon soy sauce', '1/4 cup soy sauce', '3 tablespoons mirin', '1 1/2 lbs boneless chicken, cut into 1-inch cubes', '1/4 cup rice vinegar', '1/4 cup sugar', '2 tablespoons hoisin sauce', '1 tablespoon chili paste with garlic', '10 black peppercorns, crushed', '2 teaspoons sesame oil', '2 -3 cups vegetable oil (for frying)', '5 hot chili peppers, cut in half', '1 (1 inch) knob fresh ginger, peeled and minced', '3 garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups broccoli florets', '1 red bell pepper, seeded and thinly sliced', '3 green onions, thinly sliced, for garnish', 'white rice, for serving']

Directions:
['in a medium bowl, combine the egg, 3 tablespoons of cornstarch, 1 tablespoon of soy sauce, and 1 tablespoon mirin. add the chicken and let it marinate at room temperature while you assemble the rest of the ingredients.', 'in a separate bowl, combine the remaining tablespoon of cornstarch, the remaining 1/4 cup soy sauce, the remaining 2 tablespoons mirin, and the rice vinegar, sugar, hoisin, chili paste, peppercorns, sesame oil, and 1/2 cup water. set aside.', 'in a heavy pot over medium heat, heat 3 inches of oil to 360°f.', 'add about 10 pieces of chicken to the hot oil and fry until brown and crispy, about 2 minutes. remove from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels. repeat with the remaining chicken. set aside.', 'remove all but 3 tablespoons of oil from the pot and add the chilies, ginger, and garlic, and cook for 30 seconds. add the broccoli and bell pepper and stir-fry, tossing the vegetables for 2 minutes or until they are brightly colored and partially cooked.', 'add the cooked chicken to the pot along with the reserved sauce and cook, stirring, until the sauce thickens and the vegetables are tender, about 2 minutes.', 'to serve, sprinkle green onions over the top and serve hot with rice.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is fish-free, legume-free. Use these ingredients: ['1/2 c. water', 'large round steak', 'salt', 'pepper', '3 tbsp. flour', 'skim milk', '1 large can mushrooms, drained', 'canola oil']

steak and gravy

['pour water into crock-pot.', 'turn on so it can begin to heat. cut round steak into serving-sized pieces.', 'salt and pepper steak and brown in canola oil.', '(works best to brown in iron skillet.) as pieces brown, remove from grease and put in crock-pot.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is egg-free. Use these ingredients: ['2 tablespoons butter', '10 ounces sliced cremini mushrooms', '1 large shallot, chopped', '2 tablespoons flour', '2/3 cup dry marsala wine', '2/3 cup half-and-half', '2 1/3 cups chicken stock or 2 1/3 cups water', '2 tablespoons chopped flat leaf parsley', 'salt and pepper', '1 1/3 cups orzo pasta', '2 cups coarsely chopped rotisserie cooked chicken', '1/4 cup grated asiago cheese']
output:
chicken marsala orzo bake

Ingredients:
['2 tablespoons butter', '10 ounces sliced cremini mushrooms', '1 large shallot, chopped', '2 tablespoons flour', '2/3 cup dry marsala wine', '2/3 cup half-and-half', '2 1/3 cups chicken stock or 2 1/3 cups water', '2 tablespoons chopped flat leaf parsley', 'salt and pepper', '1 1/3 cups orzo pasta', '2 cups coarsely chopped rotisserie cooked chicken', '1/4 cup grated asiago cheese']

Directions:
['preheat the oven to 350 degrees . in a large skillet, heat the butter over medium-high heat until just melted. add the mushrooms and shallot, and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 5 minutes. sprinkle the flour on top and stir in for 1 minute. stir in the marsala and cream and simmer, stirring occasionally, until slightly thickened, about 3 minutes. stir in chicken stock or water, the parsley, salt and pepper to taste.', 'in a greased 9-inch-by-13-inch casserole, spread the chicken in an even layer; top with the orzo. pour the mushroom gravy on top. cover snugly with foil and bake until bubbly, about 35 minutes. discard the foil, sprinkle the asiago on top and bake for 5 minutes more.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is sugar-free, beef-free, alcohol-free. Use these ingredients: ['4 tablespoons butter', '2 tablespoons salad oil', '2 medium onions, peeled and finely chopped', '12-1 garlic clove, minced', '2 cups canned tomatoes', '12 teaspoon salt', '1 pinch pepper', '18 teaspoon salt', '14 teaspoon basil', '1 bay leaf', '1 tablespoon cornstarch', '1 tablespoon cold water', '8 ounces noodles', '3 cups old cheddar cheese, finely grated', '12-34 cup sliced ripe olives, pimento stuffed']
output:
savoury noodle bake

Ingredients:
['4 tablespoons butter', '2 tablespoons salad oil', '2 medium onions, peeled and finely chopped', '12-1 garlic clove, minced', '2 cups canned tomatoes', '12 teaspoon salt', '1 pinch pepper', '18 teaspoon salt', '14 teaspoon basil', '1 bay leaf', '1 tablespoon cornstarch', '1 tablespoon cold water', '8 ounces noodles', '3 cups old cheddar cheese, finely grated', '12-34 cup sliced ripe olives, pimento stuffed']

Directions:
['combine 2 tablespoons butter and salad oil in saucepan over low heat; add onion and garlic and cook, stirring frequently until onion begins to brown.', 'add tomatoes, sugar, salt, pepper, basil and bay leaf and bring to boiling point, stirring gently to avoid breaking up tomatoes.', 'simmer about 15 min.', '; remove from heat and discard bay leaf.', 'blend cornstarch and cold water until mixture is smooth; add about 1/2 cup hot tomato mixture and blend thoroughly, then stir it into remaining mixture in saucepan.', 'cook over moderately high heat, stirring constantly until thick.', 'remove from heat.', 'cook noodles, drain, rinse with hot water, then drain again thoroughly.', 'toss in a large bowl with remaining butter, and 2 cups cheese; add tomato sauce and olive slices and toss the second time.', 'put in a 7-cup baking dish, sprinkle with remaining cheese and bake in 350 oven for 30 to 45 minutes.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is pork-free, chicken-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 lb bay scallops', '1 box angel hair pasta', '1 stick butter', '1/4 cup olive oil', '1/4 cup grated parmesan', '1 tsp anchovy paste', '2 tbsp fresh chopped parsley', '1/4 tsp thyme', '1/2 cup dry white wine', '1 small onion chopped', '4 clove chopped garlic']

angel scallops

Directions:

instruction: Generate a recipe that is soy-free. Use these ingredients: ['2 cups yellow onions, finely diced', '12 cup garlic, chopped', '34 cup lime juice', '3 ounces triple sec', '5 ounces tequila', '4 ounces butter (divided)', '12 tablespoon coriander, ground', '3 tablespoons fresh cilantro, medium diced', '12 cup poblano pepper, medium diced', '1 12 tablespoons cornstarch', '1 ounce water', '36 medium shrimp, shelled and deveined']
output:
margarita shrimp

Ingredients:
['2 cups yellow onions, finely diced', '12 cup garlic, chopped', '34 cup lime juice', '3 ounces triple sec', '5 ounces tequila', '4 ounces butter (divided)', '12 tablespoon coriander, ground', '3 tablespoons fresh cilantro, medium diced', '12 cup poblano pepper, medium diced', '1 12 tablespoons cornstarch', '1 ounce water', '36 medium shrimp, shelled and deveined']

Directions:
['in a sauce pan melt 2 tbls butter and saute shrimp till pink, set aside and keep warm.', 'in a separate sauce pan melt 2 tbls butter and saute, onions and garlic until tender.', 'add lime juice, triple sec and tequila, simmer for about 5 minutes.', 'add 4 tbls butter, slowly melt and stir in ground coriander.', 'mix together the cornstarch and water, set aside.', 'add in the fresh cilantro and poblano peppers to saucepan and simmer for 5 minutes.', 'stir in the cornstarch mixture until thicken.', 'top cooked shrimp with the onion mixture.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is chicken-free, legume-free, processed-meat-free. Use these ingredients: ['1/2 cup kraft roasted red pepper with parmesan dressing', '1 boneless beef sirloin steak (1 lb./450 g)', "1/2 cup bull's-eye bold original barbecue sauce"]
output:
bistro steak

Ingredients:
['1/2 cup kraft roasted red pepper with parmesan dressing', '1 boneless beef sirloin steak (1 lb./450 g)', "1/2 cup bull's-eye bold original barbecue sauce"]

Directions:
['pour dressing over steak in shallow dish; turn steak over to evenly coat both sides.', 'refrigerate 30 min.', 'to marinate.', 'heat barbecue to medium heat.', 'remove steak from marinade.', 'discard marinade.', 'grill steak 13 to 16 min.', 'or to medium doneness (160f), turning and brushing occasionally with barbecue sauce.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is peanut-free. Use these ingredients: ['for the muffins:', '1-1/2 cup all-purpose flour', '1-1/2 teaspoon baking powder', '1/2 teaspoons salt', '1/2 teaspoons ground cinnamon', '1/2 teaspoons ground nutmeg', '1 cup granulated sugar', '1/2 cups unsalted butter, room temperature', '1 whole egg', '1/2 cups buttermilk', '_____', 'for the coating:', '4 tablespoons unsalted butter, melted', '3/4 cups granulated sugar', '1 teaspoon ground cinnamon']
output:
snickerdoodle muffins

Ingredients:
['for the muffins:', '1-1/2 cup all-purpose flour', '1-1/2 teaspoon baking powder', '1/2 teaspoons salt', '1/2 teaspoons ground cinnamon', '1/2 teaspoons ground nutmeg', '1 cup granulated sugar', '1/2 cups unsalted butter, room temperature', '1 whole egg', '1/2 cups buttermilk', '_____', 'for the coating:', '4 tablespoons unsalted butter, melted', '3/4 cups granulated sugar', '1 teaspoon ground cinnamon']

Directions:
['preheat oven to 350 degrees f. grease the muffin tin with nonstick spray, or line the muffin tins with paper.', 'in a medium bowl mix the flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon and nutmeg. in a separate medium bowl cream together the sugar, butter, and egg. mix well. alliteratively add the flour mixture and buttermilk. mix well, making sure to scrape down the sides and bottom of the bowl. fill each cavity in the muffin tin 2/3 full. bake for 15-20 minutes.', 'when cooled, prepare the coating. melt the butter in a bowl. in a separate bowl, mix the sugar and cinnamon. dip one muffin into the melted butter, then immediately roll in the sugar mixture. continue with each muffin.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is legume-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 3/4 c. all-purpose flour', '2/3 c. sugar', '2 teaspoon baking pwdr', '1/2 teaspoon baking soda', '1/4 teaspoon salt', '1 c. mashed ripe bananas (2-3 med. bananas)', '1 jar (4 ounce.) baby food prunes (replaces 1/3 c. shortening, butter)', '2 tbsp. skim lowfat milk', '2 large eggs', '1/4 c. minced nuts (optional)']
output:
lo fat banana bread recipe

Ingredients:
['1 3/4 c. all-purpose flour', '2/3 c. sugar', '2 teaspoon baking pwdr', '1/2 teaspoon baking soda', '1/4 teaspoon salt', '1 c. mashed ripe bananas (2-3 med. bananas)', '1 jar (4 ounce.) baby food prunes (replaces 1/3 c. shortening, butter)', '2 tbsp. skim lowfat milk', '2 large eggs', '1/4 c. minced nuts (optional)']

Directions:
['in a large mixer bowl combine 1 c. of the flour, the sugar, baking pwdr, baking soda and salt.', 'add in mashed bananas, baby food prunes and lowfat milk.', 'beat with an electric mixer on low speed till blended, then on high speed for 2 min.', 'add in large eggs and remaining flour, beat till blended.', 'stir in nuts.', 'pour batter into a greased 8 x 4 x 2 inch loaf pan.', 'bake at 350 degrees for 55-60 min or possibly till toothpick inserted near center comes out clean.', 'cold for 10 min; remove from pan.', 'cold thoroughly.', 'wrap and store overnight before slicing.', 'makes 1 loaf (16 servings).']

hush puppies

instruction: Generate a recipe that is soy-free. Use these ingredients: ['2 cups frozen hash brown potatoes, thawed', '1 cup milk', '4 eggs', '1/4 teaspoon pepper', '1 cup cooked cubed ham', '1/4 cup sliced green onion', '1/4 cup chopped red bell pepper', '1 cup shredded cheddar cheese']
output:
cheesy ham and potato casserole

Ingredients:
['2 cups frozen hash brown potatoes, thawed', '1 cup milk', '4 eggs', '1/4 teaspoon pepper', '1 cup cooked cubed ham', '1/4 cup sliced green onion', '1/4 cup chopped red bell pepper', '1 cup shredded cheddar cheese']

Directions:
['heat oven to 375°.', 'press potatoes on the bottom and up the sides of a greased 9-inch pie plate.', 'bake for 10 minutes.', 'mix milk, eggs, and pepper in medium bowl.', 'stir in ham, 2 tablespoons green onions, and 2 tablespoons red pepper.', 'sprinkle half of the cheese over potatoes.', 'pour the egg mixture over the cheese.', 'bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until knife inserted in the center comes out clean.', 'top with remaining cheese, green onions and red pepper.', 'let stand for 10 minutes before serving or put back in oven until cheese melts.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is peanut-free, fish-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 1/4 cups fresh cilantro, chopped', '3/4 cup olive oil', '5 limes, juice of, only', '2 1/2 teaspoons ground cumin', '1 1/4 teaspoons chili powder', '3 lbs boneless chicken breast halves (i used chicken tenders)', '3 poblano chiles, seed and cut into 3/4 inch wide strips', '1 yellow bell pepper, seeded and cut into 3/4 inch wide strips', '2 red bell peppers, seeded and cut into 3/4 inch wide strips', '2 red onions, sliced into 1/2 inch rounds and separated into rings', '12 (8 inch) flour tortillas', 'optional toppings', 'salsa', 'sour cream', 'chopped cilantro', 'avocado, sliced', 'sliced black olives', 'chopped red chili pepper']
output:
chicken fajitas with grilled peppers and onions

Ingredients:
['1 1/4 cups fresh cilantro, chopped', '3/4 cup olive oil', '5 limes, juice of, only', '2 1/2 teaspoons ground cumin', '1 1/4 teaspoons chili powder', '3 lbs boneless chicken breast halves (i used chicken tenders)', '3 poblano chiles, seed and cut into 3/4 inch wide strips', '1 yellow bell pepper, seeded and cut into 3/4 inch wide strips', '2 red bell peppers, seeded and cut into 3/4 inch wide strips', '2 red onions, sliced into 1/2 inch rounds and separated into rings', '12 (8 inch) flour tortillas', 'optional toppings', 'salsa', 'sour cream', 'chopped cilantro', 'avocado, sliced', 'sliced black olives', 'chopped red chili pepper']

Directions:
['prepare barbecue.', 'puree first 5 ingredients (cilantro - chili powder) in blender (or food processor).', 'place chicken in a glass baking dish and pour 1/3 of marinade over chicken, turning to coat all sides.', 'arrange vegetables (chilies - onions) on a rimmed grilling pan or baking pan, pour 1/3 of marinade over vegetables. season chicken and vegetables with salt and pepper if desired.', 'grill chicken until cooked through (7 -10 minutes per side, depending on thickness of chicken). grill vegetables until tender, turning often (about 15 minutes). grill tortillas until charred (1 minute per side).', 'transfer chicken to work surface and slice cross wise into strips.', 'fill tortillas with chicken and vegetables and drizzle with remaining marinade.', 'serve with your favorite salsa and toppings.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is nut-free, low-carb. Use these ingredients: ['1 lb. lean ground beef', '2 slices sandwich bread, cubed', '1/2 c. milk', '1 egg, beaten', '1 1/4 c. shredded mozzarella cheese', '1 tbsp. chopped fresh parsley', '1/2 tsp. salt and pepper', '8 pieces manicotti or shells', '1 (32 to 36 oz.) jar spaghetti sauce', '1/4 c. grated parmesan cheese']
output:
manicotti or large seashells

Ingredients:
['1 lb. lean ground beef', '2 slices sandwich bread, cubed', '1/2 c. milk', '1 egg, beaten', '1 1/4 c. shredded mozzarella cheese', '1 tbsp. chopped fresh parsley', '1/2 tsp. salt and pepper', '8 pieces manicotti or shells', '1 (32 to 36 oz.) jar spaghetti sauce', '1/4 c. grated parmesan cheese']

Directions:
['in skillet, brown beef.', 'remove from heat; drain off fat. combine bread and milk and let stand 2 minutes.', 'add bread and milk mixture to beef.', 'stir in egg, mozzarella cheese, parsley, salt and pepper; set aside.', 'cook manicotti or shells according to package.', 'spread 1 1/2 cups sauce in a 13 x 9-inch baking dish. fill manicotti/shells with beef mixture and place in single layer on sauce in prepared dish.', 'cover with remaining sauce and top with parmesan cheese.', 'bake, covered, at 350° for 45 minutes. serves 8 manicotti or shells.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is sugar-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 none cauliflower (3 1/4 lbs), cut into small florets', '1 none leek, thinly sliced', '8 cloves garlic, unpeeled', '2 tsp cumin seeds', '4 cups vegetable stock', '1/2 cup milk', '2 tbsp coarsely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley', 'none none for the rouille', '1 none red pepper, quartered and seeded', '1/2 tsp hot paprika', '1 clove garlic, quartered', '1/2 cup stale breadcrumbs', '2 tsp lemon juice', '2 tsp olive oil']
output:
roasted cauliflower and garlic soup with rouille

Ingredients:
['1 none cauliflower (3 1/4 lbs), cut into small florets', '1 none leek, thinly sliced', '8 cloves garlic, unpeeled', '2 tsp cumin seeds', '4 cups vegetable stock', '1/2 cup milk', '2 tbsp coarsely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley', 'none none for the rouille', '1 none red pepper, quartered and seeded', '1/2 tsp hot paprika', '1 clove garlic, quartered', '1/2 cup stale breadcrumbs', '2 tsp lemon juice', '2 tsp olive oil']

Directions:
['preheat the oven to 425°f. spray 2 baking pans with no stick cooking spray. divide cauliflower, leek and garlic among pans. spray lightly with cooking spray. roast for 25 mins, or until vegetables are tender.', 'meanwhile, toast cumin in large saucepan, stirring, until fragrant. remove half from the pan and set aside.', 'when cool enough to handle, use fingers to squeeze garlic flesh into pan. add cauliflower, leek, stock and 1 1/2 cups water; bring to a boil. reduce heat to low; simmer, uncovered, for 15 mins. reserve 2 tbsp stock mixture for rouille.', 'for the rouille, preheat the broiler. roast pepper, skin-side up, until skin blisters and blackens. cover with plastic wrap for 5 mins. peel away skin, then chop coarsely pepper.', 'blend or process pepper with paprika, garlic, breadcrumbs, lemon juice, 1 tbsp water and the reserved stock until smooth. with motor operating, gradually add oil in thin, steady stream; process until combined.', 'blend or process soup with milk, in batches, until smooth. reheat soup in same pan; stir in parsley.', 'serve soup drizzled with rouille and sprinkled with reserved cumin seeds.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is beef-free, peanut-free, soy-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 turkey', 'dry mustard', 'worcestershire sauce', 'olive oil', 'salt', 'black pepper', 'vinegar', '1 onion, cut in half', 'celery', 'parsley', 'bacon', 'butter', '2 c. chicken stock']
output:
perfect baked turkey

Ingredients:
['1 turkey', 'dry mustard', 'worcestershire sauce', 'olive oil', 'salt', 'black pepper', 'vinegar', '1 onion, cut in half', 'celery', 'parsley', 'bacon', 'butter', '2 c. chicken stock']

Directions:
['the day before or a few hours before cooking, make a soft paste of dry mustard, worcestershire sauce, olive oil, salt, pepper and a little vinegar in proportions to make spreadable.', 'rub the bird well inside and out with this, then place inside a whole onion, cut in half, 2 pieces celery and little parsley.', 'lay 2 pieces of bacon across breast and stick hunks of butter (about 1 stick) between drumstick and body.', 'soak cheesecloth or dish towel in olive oil. lay over bird and put in uncovered roaster.', 'add 1 or 2 cups stock. bake at 300° for 30 minutes per pound for a 7 to 10 pound turkey or 18 minutes per pound for a 15 to 18 pound turkey.', 'baste once or twice.', 'browns beautifully and juicy.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is sesame-free, chicken-free. Use these ingredients: ['2 tablespoons olive oil', '1 shallot minced', '1 clove garlic', '1 jalapeno seeded and minced', '1 pound shrimp peeled, deveined and chopped', '8 ounces bay scallops', '1/4 cup dry white wine', '1/4 cup heavy cream', 'salt', 'pepper', '24 corn tortillas', '1 1/2 pounds tomatillos', '1 tablespoon olive oil', '2 tablespoons shallot minced', '3 cups heavy cream', '1/2 cup sour cream', 'salt', 'white pepper', '8 ounces monterey jack cheese', '4 ounces goat cheese crumbles']
output:
shrimp and scallop enchiladas with tomatillo cream sauce

Ingredients:
['2 tablespoons olive oil', '1 shallot minced', '1 clove garlic', '1 jalapeno seeded and minced', '1 pound shrimp peeled, deveined and chopped', '8 ounces bay scallops', '1/4 cup dry white wine', '1/4 cup heavy cream', 'salt', 'pepper', '24 corn tortillas', '1 1/2 pounds tomatillos', '1 tablespoon olive oil', '2 tablespoons shallot minced', '3 cups heavy cream', '1/2 cup sour cream', 'salt', 'white pepper', '8 ounces monterey jack cheese', '4 ounces goat cheese crumbles']

Directions:
['saute shallots, garlic and jalapeno in olive oil until soft, but not brown, about 1 minute. add chopped shrimp and scallops until shrimp are slightly pink. add white wine and simmer until wine is almost evaporated. pour in cream to moisten the filling and remove from heat. transfer the mixture to a bowl to stop the cooking.', 'spoon onto corn tortillas and roll into cigar shape. line them up in a large baking dish or small individual dishes.', 'roast tomatillos in a 400 degree ove until the skins split, but not too brown. remove from oven and cool. puree in a food processor or blender.', 'saute shallot in olive oil until translucent, about 2 minutes. add heavy cream and sour cream. simmer until slightly thickened. add tomatillo puree. season with salt and white pepper to taste.', 'pour over rolled enchiladas. sprinkle with monterey jack cheese and goat cheese.', 'bake at 400 degrees until sauce is bubbly around the edges and tortillas are golden brown. about 15 minutes. do not over cook.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is processed-meat-free. Use these ingredients: ['2 garlic cloves, peeled, crushed', '1 1" piece peeled ginger, thinly sliced', '1/2 cup reduced-sodium soy sauce', '1/2 cup dried wakame (optional)', '2 tablespoons vegetable oil', '1/2 pound maitake mushrooms, torn into large pieces', 'kosher salt, freshly ground pepper', '8 ounces soba (japanese-style noodles)', '4 baby turnips or radishes, trimmed, thinly sliced', '4 large egg yolks', '4 scallions, thinly sliced', '1 tablespoon toasted sesame seeds']
output:
soba and maitake mushrooms in soy broth

Ingredients:
['2 garlic cloves, peeled, crushed', '1 1" piece peeled ginger, thinly sliced', '1/2 cup reduced-sodium soy sauce', '1/2 cup dried wakame (optional)', '2 tablespoons vegetable oil', '1/2 pound maitake mushrooms, torn into large pieces', 'kosher salt, freshly ground pepper', '8 ounces soba (japanese-style noodles)', '4 baby turnips or radishes, trimmed, thinly sliced', '4 large egg yolks', '4 scallions, thinly sliced', '1 tablespoon toasted sesame seeds']

Directions:
['bring garlic, ginger, and 4 cups water to a boil in a small saucepan; reduce heat and simmer 10 minutes. add soy sauce and wakame, if using. set broth aside.', 'heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. add mushrooms; season with salt and pepper. cook, tossing occasionally, until golden brown and crisp, 10-12 minutes. transfer to a large plate.', 'meanwhile, cook soba in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente; drain. return reserved broth to a simmer.', 'divide soba and broth among bowls; top with mushrooms, turnips, and egg yolks. add scallions and sprinkle with sesame seeds.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is processed-meat-free, honey-free, egg-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 stick margarine', '4 tbsp. cocoa', '1/2 c. milk', '2 c. sugar', '2 c. oats', '1/2 c. peanut butter']
output:
chocolate peanut butter cookies

['1 stick margarine', '4 tbsp. cocoa', '1/2 c. milk', '2 c. sugar', '2 c. oats', '1/2 c. peanut butter']

Directions:
['melt margarine; add sugar, cocoa and milk.', 'stir; bring to boil.', 'boil 1 minute.', 'remove from heat; add oats and peanut butter.', 'mix well.', 'drop onto wax paper.', 'harden and serve.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is legume-free, fish-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 1/2 lb. lean pork shoulder, cut in 2 x 1/2-inch strips', '1 lb. (no. 2) can pineapple chunks, drained (2 1/2 c.)', '1/4 c. brown sugar', '2 tbsp. cornstarch', '1/4 c. sugar', '2 to 3 tbsp. soy sauce', '1/2 tsp. salt', '1 small green pepper, cut in strips', '1/4 c. thinly sliced onion']
output:
sweet-sour pork

Ingredients:
['1 1/2 lb. lean pork shoulder, cut in 2 x 1/2-inch strips', '1 lb. (no. 2) can pineapple chunks, drained (2 1/2 c.)', '1/4 c. brown sugar', '2 tbsp. cornstarch', '1/4 c. sugar', '2 to 3 tbsp. soy sauce', '1/2 tsp. salt', '1 small green pepper, cut in strips', '1/4 c. thinly sliced onion']

Directions:
['brown pork; add 1/3 cup water.', 'cover and simmer until tender, about 1 hour.', 'drain pineapple, reserving syrup.', 'combine sugars and cornstarch.', 'add pineapple, syrup, soy sauce and salt.', 'add to pork; stir until thick.', 'add pineapple, green pepper and onion. cook 2 minutes.', 'serve over hot rice or fried noodles and extra soy sauce.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is beef-free, sesame-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 c. sugar', '1 c. brown sugar', '1 c. oil', '2 eggs', '2 c. flour', '1 tsp. soda', '1/2 tsp. salt', '1/2 tsp. baking powder', '2 c. oatmeal', '6 oz. chocolate chips', '1 c. coconut', '1 c. raisins']
output:
chocolate raisin cookies

Ingredients:
['1 c. sugar', '1 c. brown sugar', '1 c. oil', '2 eggs', '2 c. flour', '1 tsp. soda', '1/2 tsp. salt', '1/2 tsp. baking powder', '2 c. oatmeal', '6 oz. chocolate chips', '1 c. coconut', '1 c. raisins']

Directions:
['blend sugar and oil; cream in eggs.', 'add dry ingredients, then oatmeal.', 'mix thoroughly; fold in chocolate chips and raisins. the batter will be thick.', 'add a small amount of milk.', 'bake in a 350° oven for 10 minutes.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is shellfish-free, low-carb. Use these ingredients: ['4 slices homemade style bread', '3 tablespoons butter', '3 tablespoons tomato pizza sauce', '12 small sweet red pepper, chopped small', '2 medium mushrooms, sliced thin', '8 slices pepperoni, sliced thin', '2 slices cooked deli ham', '12 cup grated mozzarella cheese, if desired (or more)', '12 cup pineapple tidbits, well drained']
output:
uncle bill's pizza grilled cheese sandwich

Ingredients:
['4 slices homemade style bread', '3 tablespoons butter', '3 tablespoons tomato pizza sauce', '12 small sweet red pepper, chopped small', '2 medium mushrooms, sliced thin', '8 slices pepperoni, sliced thin', '2 slices cooked deli ham', '12 cup grated mozzarella cheese, if desired (or more)', '12 cup pineapple tidbits, well drained']

Directions:
['butter both sides of the sliced bread.', 'spread tomato pizza sauce on one side of each slice of bread; set 2 slices aside.', 'sprinkle chopped red pepper on only 2 slices of bread.', 'layer with sliced mushrooms, slices of pepperoni, cooked ham and grated mozzarella.', 'sprinkle with pineapple tidbits.', 'now cover the top with the 2 slices of bread and press together lightly.', 'in a heavy bottomed frying pan over medium heat, grill sandwich for about 2 1/2 minutes, then turn over and continue to grill for another 2 1/2 minutes or until the cheese melts and the sandwich is golden brown.', 'slice each sandwich in half diagonally.', 'serve with sliced peppers, baby carrots, cucumber slices and your favorite dip.', 'you may also use a george foreman grill to cook the sandwiches.', 'slices of onion and tomatoes can also be used in the sandwich.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is chicken-free, fish-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 pound fresh mozzarella cheese', '1/4 cup extra-virgin olive oil', '2 cloves garlic', '1/2 cup large fresh bread crumbs, not toasted (big guy crumbs recommended)', '8 tablespoons white wine vinegar', 'salt and freshly ground black pepper', '1/2 bunch chopped fresh oregano leaves', 'chili flakes']
output:
fried cheese: mozzarella fritto

Ingredients:
['1 pound fresh mozzarella cheese', '1/4 cup extra-virgin olive oil', '2 cloves garlic', '1/2 cup large fresh bread crumbs, not toasted (big guy crumbs recommended)', '8 tablespoons white wine vinegar', 'salt and freshly ground black pepper', '1/2 bunch chopped fresh oregano leaves', 'chili flakes']

Directions:
['slice the mozzarella 3/4-inch slices.', 'in a large frying pan, heat the oil over high heat until hot but not smoking.', 'add the garlic cloves and fry, pushing the garlic cloves through the oil to infuse the oil with the garlic flavor.', 'as soon as the garlic begins to color, remove from the pan.', 'smash cheese slices into bread crumbs.', 'lower the heat to medium-high, and place the cheese slices into the pan in 1 layer.', 'make sure to leave enough room so that the cheese slices can be flipped.', 'fry on both sides until golden brown, about 2 to 4 minutes per side.', 'remove and let drain on a serving plate lined with paper towels.', 'sprinkle the fried cheese lightly with vinegar.', 'season with salt and pepper, to taste, and the fresh oregano.', 'repeat with remaining slices until all the cheese has been fried.', 'serve hot sprinkled with chili flakes.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is shellfish-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 (14 oz.) can sweetened condensed milk', '1/2 c. fresh lime juice', '3 large egg yolks', '1 (9-inch) baked pie crust', '3 large egg whites', '1/4 tsp. cream of tartar', '6 tbsp. sugar']
output:
key lime pie

Ingredients:
['1 (14 oz.) can sweetened condensed milk', '1/2 c. fresh lime juice', '3 large egg yolks', '1 (9-inch) baked pie crust', '3 large egg whites', '1/4 tsp. cream of tartar', '6 tbsp. sugar']

Directions:
['combine condensed milk and lime juice in medium-size bowl. blend in egg yolks; turn into cooled crust.', 'heat oven to 325°. beat egg whites with cream of tartar in small bowl until soft peaks form.', 'beat in sugar, one tablespoon at a time, until egg whites form stiff, glossy peaks.', 'spoon over filling.', 'spread to edge of crust to seal.', 'bake 15 minutes or until golden.', 'cool on wire rack to room temperature.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is legume-free, gluten-free, beef-free. Use these ingredients: ['2 c. sugar', '1/4 lb. oleo', '1/4 c. cocoa', '1/2 c. milk', '1/2 c. crunchy peanut butter', '3 c. oatmeal', '1 tsp. vanilla']

['bring the first 4 ingredients to rolling boil and boil 1 minute.', 'take off fire and add remaining ingredients.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is alcohol-free. Use these ingredients: ['2 cups self-rising flour', '1 cup buttermilk', '3 tbsp. oil or bacon fat']
output:
self-rising buttermilk biscuits

Ingredients:
['2 cups self-rising flour', '1 cup buttermilk', '3 tbsp. oil or bacon fat']

Directions:
['place flour in large bowl.', 'make a well in center of flour. add milk and oil.', 'mix with spoon (you may need more or less milk) and turn out on well floured board or waxed paper.', 'knead lightly. pat 1/2 inch thick.', 'cut.', 'turn biscuit top and bottom side in very well oiled 9x13 baking pan.', 'bake at 500 degrees until golden brown.', 'makes 9-12 biscuits.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is processed-meat-free, dairy-free, pork-free. Use these ingredients: ['4 c. apples', '2 c. sugar', '3 eggs', '1/2 c. oil', '2 tsp. vanilla', '2 c. flour', '2 tsp. cinnamon', '2 tsp. baking soda', '1 c. walnuts']

apple walnut cake

Directions:
['dice apples. mix with sugar. beat in eggs. add oil and vanilla. mix together flour, cinnamon and baking soda. add chopped walnuts. bake 1 hour at 350°.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is fish-free, alcohol-free. Use these ingredients: ['8 ounces graham crackers 1/2 box', '24 ounces frozen raspberries 2 12-ounce packages', '1 pound cream cheese softened', '1/2 cup confectioners sugar', '4 ounces 2% lowfat greek yogurt plain', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '2 teaspoons lemon juice']
output:
no-bake raspberry cheesecake pots

Ingredients:
['8 ounces graham crackers 1/2 box', '24 ounces frozen raspberries 2 12-ounce packages', '1 pound cream cheese softened', '1/2 cup confectioners sugar', '4 ounces 2% lowfat greek yogurt plain', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '2 teaspoons lemon juice']

Directions:
['equipment: 16 4-oz glass dishes (such as mason jars, wine glasses, souffle cups, etc.) or 8 8-oz glass dishes or 1 trifle bowl', 'to make the cookie crumble layer: in a sealed, plastic bag, crush the cookies with a rolling pin. set aside.', 'to make the yogurt cheesecake filling: using a mixer, beat the softened cream cheese on medium speed for 6 minutes. scrape down the sides of the
bowl.', "add the confectioner's sugar, plain yogurt, salt and lemon juice. mix until combined and smooth (about 3
minutes). scrape down the sides of the bowl.", 'in a sealed bag, gently crush 12-ounces of frozen raspberries with a rolling pin.', 'add the 12 ounces of crushed raspberries to the cream cheese mixture. mix to combine the raspberries, making
sure the filling is uniform in color. the filling will become lumpy once the raspberries are added to the cream
cheese.', 'to make the melted raspberry topping: crush the second bag of raspberries in the same way you crushed the first. set aside.', 'assemble: evenly divide the cookie crumbles in the bottom of each jar; shake the jar to make sure the cookie layer is
somewhat evenly distributed on the bottom of the jar.', 'divide the yogurt cheesecake filling evenly onto the cookie crumbles in the 8 mason jars. smooth the top of each
jar after adding the filling.', 'divide the crushed, melted raspberries between the 8 mason jars by placing it on top of the raspberry cream
cheese filling. smooth the top.', 'refrigerate the finished cheesecakes until ready to serve.', 'if desired garnish the tops of the mason jars with chocolates, additional frozen raspberries, or sprinkles!']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is fish-free, egg-free. Use these ingredients: ['350 ml water', '1 small banana, sliced very thin', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 teaspoon cinnamon', '150 g rolled oats, not instant not quick', '1 teaspoon vanilla extract']
output:
creamy banana oatmeal

Ingredients:
['350 ml water', '1 small banana, sliced very thin', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 teaspoon cinnamon', '150 g rolled oats, not instant not quick', '1 teaspoon vanilla extract']

Directions:
['place the water, banana, salt and cinnamon in a large saucepan. beat with a whisk until combined.', 'turn the heat on high and bring to the boil. add the oats and turn the heat to medium - keeping at a fast simmer.', 'cook 10 minutes, stirring frequently.', 'add the vanilla extract and cook an additional minute.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is soy-free, gluten-free. Use these ingredients: ['5 slices day-old bread, cubed', '5 oz. grated cheddar cheese', '1 lb. sausage, browned, drained and crumbled', '5 eggs, slightly beaten', '1 1/2 c. milk', '1/2 tsp. milk', '1/2 tsp. salt', '1/2 tsp. dry mustard']

egg brunch

Directions:
['mix milk, salt and dry mustard together and add to the eggs. put bread in greased 9 x 12-inch pan.', 'add cheese and sausage in layers.', 'pour egg mixture over the top and let set in refrigerator overnight.', 'bake at 375° for 35 minutes.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is alcohol-free, dairy-free, fish-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 1/8 c. margarine', '2 1/4 c. sugar', '2 tbsp. molasses', '1 1/2 tsp. vanilla', '2 eggs', '2 1/2 c. flour', '1/2 tsp. baking soda', '2 tsp. baking powder', '2 tsp. salt', '2 tsp. cinnamon', '3 c. oatmeal', '3/4 c. chopped nuts (optional)']
output:
cinnamon crispies

Ingredients:
['1 1/8 c. margarine', '2 1/4 c. sugar', '2 tbsp. molasses', '1 1/2 tsp. vanilla', '2 eggs', '2 1/2 c. flour', '1/2 tsp. baking soda', '2 tsp. baking powder', '2 tsp. salt', '2 tsp. cinnamon', '3 c. oatmeal', '3/4 c. chopped nuts (optional)']

Directions:
['cream margarine and sugar until well blended.', 'add molasses, vanilla and eggs; mix well.', 'add dry ingredients and mix well. drop by teaspoons onto greased cookie sheet.', 'bake for 10 to 12 minutes at 350° (or until lightly browned).']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is shellfish-free. Use these ingredients: ['4 large cream cheese', '2 c. sugar', '8 eggs (add 1 at a time and beat each for 1 minute)', '1 qt. (32 oz.) sour cream (add slowly)', '2 tsp. vanilla']

dumplings

instruction: Generate a recipe that is shellfish-free, peanut-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 1/2 cups flour', '1 cup cocoa powder', '1/2 teaspoon baking powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '12 tablespoons unsalted butter', '2 cups sugar', '4 eggs', '2 teaspoons vanilla extract', '2 cups walnuts', '1 3/4 cups packed brown sugar', '3/4 cup cocoa powder', '3 cups water', 'whipped cream, for garnish']
output:
warm chocolate brownie cake with walnuts and cream

Ingredients:
['1 1/2 cups flour', '1 cup cocoa powder', '1/2 teaspoon baking powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '12 tablespoons unsalted butter', '2 cups sugar', '4 eggs', '2 teaspoons vanilla extract', '2 cups walnuts', '1 3/4 cups packed brown sugar', '3/4 cup cocoa powder', '3 cups water', 'whipped cream, for garnish']

Directions:
['preheat oven to 350 degrees f. butter and flour an oversized, 12-cup muffin tin.', 'in a large bowl sift together the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder and salt.', 'in a mixer with a whip attachment, cream the butter.', 'add the sugar and blend well.', 'add the eggs and vanilla, blending well.', 'add the dry ingredients and mix on low just until incorporated.', 'scoop into muffin tins and spread to cover the bottom.', 'sauce: whisk together the ingredients.', 'pour over and divide among the brownie batter filled muffin tins.', 'bake for 20 to 25 minutes until set.', 'serve at room temperature topped with whipped cream.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is pork-free, sesame-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 cup evoo', '1/2 cup balsamic vinegar', '1/4 cup seasoned rice wine vinegar', '4 garlic cloves, peeled', 'juice of one lemon', "2 tbs dijon mustard ( i have used dry coleman's mustard before which is also tasty)", '1 tbs sugar( i use white, brown might be tasty)', 'splash of water', 'fresh ground black pepper to taste', 'salt to taste']
output:
best viniagrette*

Ingredients:
['1 cup evoo', '1/2 cup balsamic vinegar', '1/4 cup seasoned rice wine vinegar', '4 garlic cloves, peeled', 'juice of one lemon', "2 tbs dijon mustard ( i have used dry coleman's mustard before which is also tasty)", '1 tbs sugar( i use white, brown might be tasty)', 'splash of water', 'fresh ground black pepper to taste', 'salt to taste']

Directions:
['combine everything but the extra virgin olive oil in blender. blend well for 2 minutes. turn blender on slow speed and gradually add the olive oil until it is all mixed. pour into container, refrigerate overnight and enjoy or use right away!']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is gluten-free. Use these ingredients: ['12 jalapeno peppers', '8 oz cream cheese', 'garlic powder (not salt) to taste', 'onion powder to taste', '1/2 cup asiago cheese, shredded', '1 package thick bacon']
output:
dale laube's jalapeño poppers

Ingredients:
['12 jalapeno peppers', '8 oz cream cheese', 'garlic powder (not salt) to taste', 'onion powder to taste', '1/2 cup asiago cheese, shredded', '1 package thick bacon']

Directions:
['slice open the peppers, being very careful to make sure all seeds and veins are removed. in a bowl, combine the cream cheese, garlic powder, onion powder, and asiago cheese. taste the mixture and add garlic powder or onion powder as needed. it should be thick. stuff the mixture into peppers and wrap with a slice of bacon, securing with a toothpick. grill until the bacon is cooked.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is alcohol-free. Use these ingredients: ['4 ounces bocconcini mozzarella, drained', '1 small bunch fresh basil', '1/4 pound hot coppa, thinly sliced', '1 pint cherry tomatoes (get multicolored heirlooms if you can!)', '3 heaping tablespoons whole-grain mustard', '3 heaping tablespoons fresh basil pesto', 'salt to taste', 'sliced baguette or italian bread', 'extra-virgin olive oil, for drizzling']

hot coppa caprese skewers with pesto mustard

Directions:
['combine mustard and pesto in a small bowl.', 'season with salt to taste and serve alongside skewers.']

lemon chess pie
