instruction: Generate a recipe that is sesame-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 gal. sliced cucumbers', '1 c. salt', '2 tbsp. alum', '9 c. sugar', '1 tsp. turmeric', 'spice', 'vinegar (white)', 'water']
output:
no cook, no can cucumber pickles

Ingredients:
['1 gal. sliced cucumbers', '1 c. salt', '2 tbsp. alum', '9 c. sugar', '1 tsp. turmeric', 'spice', 'vinegar (white)', 'water']

Directions:
['fill 1 gallon glass or plastic jug with sliced cucumbers. dissolve salt in enough water to cover cucumbers.', 'let set for 3 days.', 'pour off water, rinse 3 times in cold water.', 'soak 24 hours with alum in water to cover.', 'pour off and rinse 3 times in cold water.', 'cover with white vinegar, let set for 7 days.', 'drain vinegar off and throw away.', 'rinse 1 time.', 'heat 1 cup vinegar and 3 cups sugar until sugar is dissolved.', 'cool and pour over cucumbers (will not cover pickles), add pickling spice and turmeric (put spice and turmeric in soft cloth tied up).', 'let set for 24 hours.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is shellfish-free, soy-free. Use these ingredients: ['4 cornish hens (about 1 lb ea, washed & patted dry)', '4 tablespoons butter (softened)', '2 shallots (chopped)', '4 tablespoons fresh parsley (chopped)', '8 ounces grapes (seedless & halved, light green or a light color mix preferred)', '2/3 cup vermouth (white)', '1 teaspoon cornstarch', '4 tablespoons double cream (heavy cream)', '2 tablespoons pine nuts (toasted)', 'salt and black pepper (to taste pref)', 'watercress leaf (optional garnish) (optional)']
output:
cornish game hens with grapes in vermouth

Ingredients:
['4 cornish hens (about 1 lb ea, washed & patted dry)', '4 tablespoons butter (softened)', '2 shallots (chopped)', '4 tablespoons fresh parsley (chopped)', '8 ounces grapes (seedless & halved, light green or a light color mix preferred)', '2/3 cup vermouth (white)', '1 teaspoon cornstarch', '4 tablespoons double cream (heavy cream)', '2 tablespoons pine nuts (toasted)', 'salt and black pepper (to taste pref)', 'watercress leaf (optional garnish) (optional)']

Directions:
['preheat oven to 400°f.', 'using a soft pastry brush, spread the soft butter all over the outside surface of hens & then put a hazelnut size piece in the cavity of ea hen. mix shallots & parsley together & place 1/4 of the mixture in the cavity of ea hen.', 'put the hens side-by-side in a roasting pan & roast for 40-50 min or till the juices run clear when the thickest part of the flesh is pierced w/a skewer. when cooked, transfer the hens to a warmed serving platter, cover & keep warm.', 'skim most of the fat from the roasting pan, then add the grapes & vermouth. place the pan directly over a low-heat for a few min to warm & slightly soften the grapes.', 'using a slotted spoon, lift the grapes out of the roasting pan, scatter them around the hens on the platter & cover again.', 'stir cornstarch into the cream & add to the pan juices. cook gently (stirring) for a few min till the sauce thickens. season w/salt & pepper to taste pref.', 'pour sauce around hens, sprinkle w/toasted pine nuts & garnish w/watercress sprigs, if using. serve immediately.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is peanut-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 (15 1/2 ounce) can yams, mashed', '1 (14 ounce) can condensed milk, sweetened', '2 eggs', '1 teaspoon cinnamon', '12 teaspoon nutmeg', '12 teaspoon ginger', '12 teaspoon salt', '1 pastry shells, unbaked (9-inch)', '12 cup pecans, chopped', '3 tablespoons dark brown sugar', '3 tablespoons whipping cream']
output:
sweet potato praline pie

Ingredients:
['1 (15 1/2 ounce) can yams, mashed', '1 (14 ounce) can condensed milk, sweetened', '2 eggs', '1 teaspoon cinnamon', '12 teaspoon nutmeg', '12 teaspoon ginger', '12 teaspoon salt', '1 pastry shells, unbaked (9-inch)', '12 cup pecans, chopped', '3 tablespoons dark brown sugar', '3 tablespoons whipping cream']

Directions:
['heat oven to 375 degrees.', 'in large bowl, combine yams, condensed milk, eggs, spices and salt.', 'beat at medium speed until smooth.', 'poutr into unbaked 9-inch pastry shell.', 'bake for 50 minutes or until knife inserted in center comes out clean.', 'let cool slightly.', 'sprinkle chopped pecans on top of pie.', 'set aside.', 'in small saucepan, combine dark brown sugar and whipping cream.', 'cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until sugar dissolves.', 'reduce heat and simmer 5 minutes.', 'let cool 5 minutes.', 'spoon over pie.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is alcohol-free. Use these ingredients: ['4 boneless skinless chicken breast halves', '1 12 cups finely chopped macadamia nuts', '12 teaspoon seasoning salt', '12 teaspoon caribbean jerk seasoning', '14 teaspoon dried onion flakes', '14 teaspoon onion powder', '14 teaspoon pepper', '2 eggs, lightly beaten', '14 cup vegetable oil', '12 cup crushed pineapple', '2 tablespoons apricot preserves, warmed', 'lettuce leaf']
output:
pineapple macadamia chicken

Ingredients:
['4 boneless skinless chicken breast halves', '1 12 cups finely chopped macadamia nuts', '12 teaspoon seasoning salt', '12 teaspoon caribbean jerk seasoning', '14 teaspoon dried onion flakes', '14 teaspoon onion powder', '14 teaspoon pepper', '2 eggs, lightly beaten', '14 cup vegetable oil', '12 cup crushed pineapple', '2 tablespoons apricot preserves, warmed', 'lettuce leaf']

Directions:
['flatten chicken to 1/4-in.', 'thickness.', 'in a shallow bowl, combine the nuts, seasoned salt, jerk seasoning, minced onion, onion powder and pepper.', 'place egg in another shallow bowl.', 'dip chicken in egg; coat with nut mixture.', 'let stand for 5 minutes.', 'in a skillet, cook chicken in oil for 3-4 minutes on each side or until chicken juices run clear.', 'in a small bowl, combine pineapple and apricot preserves.', 'place lettuce on each plate; top with chicken and pineapple mixture.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is processed-meat-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 cup mussels shelled', '2 eggs optional 2', '2 cups plain flour', '3 cups cold milk', '2 cups diced onions small', 'cooking oil', 'dipping sauce ingredients', '1 cup sweet white wine ., i use muscato and find it perfect for the sauce', '1/2 cup sweet chilli sauce', 'fish sauce to taste', 'fresh coriander diced']
output:
mussel fritters

Ingredients:
['1 cup mussels shelled', '2 eggs optional 2', '2 cups plain flour', '3 cups cold milk', '2 cups diced onions small', 'cooking oil', 'dipping sauce ingredients', '1 cup sweet white wine ., i use muscato and find it perfect for the sauce', '1/2 cup sweet chilli sauce', 'fish sauce to taste', 'fresh coriander diced']

Directions:
["wash mussels under cold water so as to discard any grit. then very carefully cut the mussel in half so as to have 2 halves of the shell and. discard the beard. i use a butcher knife and open the mussel from the beak end, but i guess it doesn't really matter so long as its raw. its totally up to you.if you wish to discard the bag from the flesh, as i do sometimes, its up to you also. you just need more mussels if you do. using the shell scoop out each half of flesh from each mussel.", 'dice the mussel flesh up into small bits and put into a sieve to drain off excess liquid', 'in a medium to large bowl, pour in the flour', 'next add the milk to make a batter type mix not forgetting the egg or eggs if you wish. should be a not too thin mixture', 'mix in the onions. ( the mixture should look like you are making onion fritters )', "lastly add the raw mussels and mix thoroughly. you'll get the hang of it once you've done them a few times", 'in an electric frying pan, pour in cooking oil so as to cover entire bottom of pan to a depth of about 1 ml. you will adjust the heat accordingly but not too low as its better to start high and turn down so the oils not spitting everywhere.', 'holding the bowl under your left arm, with a tablespoon, spoon out spoonfuls very carefully into the pan, and just give each one a pat down so as to spread it evenly', "the cooking time will vary but when each side is golden brown, its almost time for the cook to taste the first one. don't allow them to cook too fast", 'lightly salt each batch as they come out of the pan. i think its absolutely important to do this also', 'mix all the sauce ingredients together and drizzle over your fritter. yummly yummly', 'i put slices of bread onto a large plate to drain off any excess oil. i love this and so do a lot of my friends. hope you do']

['wash and pick fresh blueberries or thaw and drain frozen blueberries.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is sesame-free, peanut-free. Use these ingredients: ['1 egg, slightly beaten', '2 tablespoons milk', '12 cup dry breadcrumbs', '12 teaspoon salt', '12 teaspoon dried oregano, crushed', '14 teaspoon pepper', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '1 12 lbs lean ground beef', '12 cup feta cheese, crumbled', '2 -3 tomatoes, chopped or 14 cup sun-dried tomato', '14 cup tomato-based spaghetti sauce or 14 cup pasta sauce']
output:
crock-pot meatloaf

Ingredients:
['1 egg, slightly beaten', '2 tablespoons milk', '12 cup dry breadcrumbs', '12 teaspoon salt', '12 teaspoon dried oregano, crushed', '14 teaspoon pepper', '2 garlic cloves, minced', '1 12 lbs lean ground beef', '12 cup feta cheese, crumbled', '2 -3 tomatoes, chopped or 14 cup sun-dried tomato', '14 cup tomato-based spaghetti sauce or 14 cup pasta sauce']

Directions:
['in a medium bowl,combine egg & milk.', 'stir in bread crumbs,seasonings & garlic.', 'add beef tomatoes & feta cheese and mix well.', 'shape into a loaf to fit into the bottom of the slow cooker & spread sauce over the meat loaf.', 'cover & cook for 7-8 hours on low.', 'you may serve the meat loaf with rice or noodles.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is egg-free, shellfish-free, processed-meat-free. Use these ingredients: ['2 tablespoons peanut oil', '1 clove garlic, minced', '4 spring onions, finely chopped', '12 cup stale breadcrumbs', '14 cup finely chopped water chestnut', '2 tablespoons black bean sauce', '12 teaspoon sesame oil', '14 cup fresh coriander, finely chopped', '4 pork leg steaks', '200 g cooked singapore noodles', 'soy sauce, to serve']
output:
pork and black bean rolls

Ingredients:
['2 tablespoons peanut oil', '1 clove garlic, minced', '4 spring onions, finely chopped', '12 cup stale breadcrumbs', '14 cup finely chopped water chestnut', '2 tablespoons black bean sauce', '12 teaspoon sesame oil', '14 cup fresh coriander, finely chopped', '4 pork leg steaks', '200 g cooked singapore noodles', 'soy sauce, to serve']

Directions:
['heat half the oil in a pan, add garlic and spring onions.', 'cook, stirring until soft.', 'stir in breadcrumbs, water chestnuts, sauce, oil and coriander, mix well.', 'cool.', 'place steaks between two sheets of plastic wrap and using a meat mallet pound out until thin.', 'divide black bean mix evenly into four portions.', 'spread one portion over each steak, roll up from short side to enclose filling.', 'secure with a toothpick.', 'heat remaining oil in a large pan, add rolls, cook for about 2 minutes on each side, or until tender.', 'cut each roll into four pieces.', 'while rolls are cooking, cook noodles and drain.', 'divided noodles into four bowls, top with four pieces of pork roll.', 'drizzle with soy sauce.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is nut-free. Use these ingredients: ['1/2 c. butter, soft', '1/2 c. shortening', '1 c. sifted powdered sugar', '1 egg', '1 tsp. vanilla', '2 1/2 c. all-purpose flour', '1/2 tsp. salt']
output:
painted sugar cookies

['1/2 c. butter, soft', '1/2 c. shortening', '1 c. sifted powdered sugar', '1 egg', '1 tsp. vanilla', '2 1/2 c. all-purpose flour', '1/2 tsp. salt']

Directions:
['cream butter and shortening.', 'gradually add sugar, beating well at medium speed.', 'add eggs and vanilla beating well.', 'combine flour and salt.', 'stir into cream mixture.', 'chill for 1 hour. mixture may be divided in half and used later.', '(store in refrigerator.)', 'roll dough to 1/8-inch thickness on lightly floured surface.', 'cut with cookie cutters.', 'place on ungreased cookie sheet.', 'paint with egg yolk paint.']

wild rice and vegetables

instruction: Generate a recipe that is gluten-free, honey-free, sesame-free. Use these ingredients: ['4 large carrots, cut into 3/4-inch chunks', '1 butternut squash (2 1/2 pounds), peeled and cut into 3/4-inch dice', '2 medium turnips, peeled and cut into 3/4-inch dice', '2 medium red onions, cut into 1-inch pieces', '1/4 cup olive oil', 'salt and freshly ground pepper', '3/4 cup madeira or marsala', '1 large tomatopeeled, seeded and cut into 1-inch chunks', '2 teaspoons thyme leaves']
output:
winter vegetable ragout with madeira

Ingredients:
['4 large carrots, cut into 3/4-inch chunks', '1 butternut squash (2 1/2 pounds), peeled and cut into 3/4-inch dice', '2 medium turnips, peeled and cut into 3/4-inch dice', '2 medium red onions, cut into 1-inch pieces', '1/4 cup olive oil', 'salt and freshly ground pepper', '3/4 cup madeira or marsala', '1 large tomatopeeled, seeded and cut into 1-inch chunks', '2 teaspoons thyme leaves']

Directions:
['preheat the oven to 350.', 'in a large roasting pan, toss the carrots, butternut squash, turnips and onions with the olive oil and season with salt and pepper.', 'roast the vegetables for about 25 minutes, or until beginning to soften but not browned.', 'add the madeira and tomato chunks and cook for about 25 minutes, stirring once, until the madeira has evaporated and the vegetables are golden.', 'add the thyme and roast for 20 to 25 minutes longer, stirring occasionally until the vegetables are lightly caramelized.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is shellfish-free. Use these ingredients: ['2 ounces unsweetened chocolate', '1/4 cup butter, cubed', '5 tablespoons all-purpose flour', '1/3 cup plus 1 teaspoon sugar, divided', '1/4 teaspoon salt', '1 cup milk', '3 eggs,', '1 teaspoon vanilla extract', '1/4 teaspoon almond extract', '1 cup heavy whipping cream', "1/4 cup confectioners' sugar", '1/4 teaspoon vanilla extract', 'baking cocoa or ground cinnamon, optional']
output:
chocolate souffle

Ingredients:
['2 ounces unsweetened chocolate', '1/4 cup butter, cubed', '5 tablespoons all-purpose flour', '1/3 cup plus 1 teaspoon sugar, divided', '1/4 teaspoon salt', '1 cup milk', '3 eggs,', '1 teaspoon vanilla extract', '1/4 teaspoon almond extract', '1 cup heavy whipping cream', "1/4 cup confectioners' sugar", '1/4 teaspoon vanilla extract', 'baking cocoa or ground cinnamon, optional']

Directions:
['in a large heavy saucepan, melt chocolate and butter over low heat. in a small bowl, combine flour, 1/3 cup sugar and salt; add milk and stir until smooth. stir into the melted chocolate. cook and stir over medium heat until thickened and bubbly. reduce heat; cook and stir 2 minutes longer. remove from the heat.', 'in a small bowl, beat egg yolks. stir a small amount of filling into yolks, return all to the pan, stirring constantly. add extracts. in a small bowl and with clean beaters, beat egg whites on medium speed until soft peaks form. gradually beat in remaining sugar on high until stiff peaks form. with a spatula, stir a fourth of the egg whites into chocolate batter until no white streaks remain, then fold in remaining egg whites.', 'grease the bottom of 1-1/2-qt. baking dish; add souffle batter. place dish in a larger pan. fill large pan with hot water to a depth of 1 in. bake at 325° for 1 hour or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.', "for topping, beat the cream in a chilled small bowl until it begins to thicken. add confectioners' sugar and vanilla; beat until soft peaks form. serve souffle warm with a dollop of sauce. sprinkle with cocoa or cinnamon if desired."]

instruction: Generate a recipe that is sugar-free, sesame-free, low-carb. Use these ingredients: ['1 pork ribs', '2 table spoons of honey', '2 table spoons of peri peri sauce', '2 table spoons of dark soy sauce', '1 red chilli', '1 spoon lazy garlic', '3 spring onions chopped', '1 pinch of salt and pepper']
output:
kels kicking ribs!

Ingredients:
['1 pork ribs', '2 table spoons of honey', '2 table spoons of peri peri sauce', '2 table spoons of dark soy sauce', '1 red chilli', '1 spoon lazy garlic', '3 spring onions chopped', '1 pinch of salt and pepper']

Directions:
['in a large bowl mix all the ingredients together,apart from spring onion.', 'make sure chilli is chopped fine,take the ribs and dip them in the bowl of ingredients,make sure all ribs are covered with this, place them on a plate and cover them,pop in fridge for 4 hours.', 'after this pre heat oven to warm for twenty mins, place ribs in a suitable dish for oven,cook for 40 mins, bring them out give them a turn over add a few drizzles of honey , salt and pepper and put them back in for 20 minutes.', 'when ready serve on a plate with chopped spring onions.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is chicken-free. Use these ingredients: ['6 eggs', '3/4 cup sugar', '1 pint whipping cream', '1 pint whole milk', '1 pint bourbon', '1 ounce rum', 'nutmeg']
output:
papaw's egg nog

Ingredients:
['6 eggs', '3/4 cup sugar', '1 pint whipping cream', '1 pint whole milk', '1 pint bourbon', '1 ounce rum', 'nutmeg']

Directions:
['separate eggs and beat both whites and yolks.', 'add 1/2 c sugar to yolks while beating.', 'thoroughly clean beater after beating yolks.', 'add 1/ c sugar to whites once they form stiff peaks.', 'thoroughly clean beater after beating whites.', 'beat 1 pint whipping cream to soft peaks.', 'fold blended yolks, milk, bourbon and rum into the whipped cream. once combined, fold in egg whites. sprinkle nutmeg over the top.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is shellfish-free, chicken-free, fish-free. Use these ingredients: ['2 cups all-purpose flour', '4.5 tablespoons sugar', '3/4 teaspoon salt', '14 tablespoons chilled, unsalted butter, cut into cubes', '1 large egg', '2 tablespoons or more cold water', '1.5 cups (about 14 oz) lingonberry preserves', '2 tablespoons or more strawberry preserves', '1 teaspoon finely grated lemon peel', '1/4 teaspoon almond extract']
output:
syttende mai (may 17) tart

Ingredients:
['2 cups all-purpose flour', '4.5 tablespoons sugar', '3/4 teaspoon salt', '14 tablespoons chilled, unsalted butter, cut into cubes', '1 large egg', '2 tablespoons or more cold water', '1.5 cups (about 14 oz) lingonberry preserves', '2 tablespoons or more strawberry preserves', '1 teaspoon finely grated lemon peel', '1/4 teaspoon almond extract']

Directions:
['blend flour, sugar, and salt in food processor 5 seconds or whisk in large bowl if using pastry blender. add butter, and blend until coarse meal forms. add egg, egg yolk, and water. blend until moist pea-sized clumps form, adding teaspoonfuls of water if dough is dry. gather dough into ball, divide into 2 pieces, 1 slightly larger than the other. wrap and chill at least 1 hour and up to a day.', 'roll out larger dough piece onto floured surface to 12-inch round. transfer to 9-inch diameter tart pan with removable bottom. fold in overhang and press, forming double-thick sides. if desired, roll out small dough piece to 11-inch round and cut into 1/2-inch wide strips to create lattice pattern over filling.', 'preheat oven to 375 degrees. stir preserves, lemon peel, and almond extract in small bowl to blend. spoon filling into crust in pan. bake tart for 55 minutes or until crust is golden and filling bubbles thickly. cool tart in pan and store at room temperature.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is fish-free, peanut-free. Use these ingredients: ['2 c. all-purpose flour', 'pinch salt', '1/2 c. shortening']
output:
best pie crust

['2 c. all-purpose flour', 'pinch salt', '1/2 c. shortening']

Directions:
['in bowl #1 (larger bowl):', 'mix flour and pinch salt.', 'remove 1/3 of this mixture and place in bowl #2.', 'add shortening by cutting with cutting tool or fingers to the remaining flour in bowl #1.', 'cut to a real fine consistency.']

instruction: Generate a recipe that is chicken-free, pork-free. Use these ingredients: ['6 oz. semisweet chocolate', '4 oz. unsweetened baking chocolate', '6 tbsp. butter', 'margarine', '1-1/4 cup sugar', '3 eggs', '2 tsp. vanilla', '1 cup all-purpose flour', '1 tsp. baking powder', '1/4 tsp. salt', '2 cups chopped walnuts (optional)']
output:
one bowl chocolate brownie cookies

Ingredients:
['6 oz. semisweet chocolate', '4 oz. unsweetened baking chocolate', '6 tbsp. butter', 'margarine', '1-1/4 cup sugar', '3 eggs', '2 tsp. vanilla', '1 cup all-purpose flour', '1 tsp. baking powder', '1/4 tsp. salt', '2 cups chopped walnuts (optional)']

Directions:
['heat oven to 325f.', '1.', 'microwave chocolates and butter in large microwaveable bowl on high 1-1/2 to 2 minutes or until chocolate is almost melted, stirring halfway through heating time.', 'stir until chocolate is completely melted and smooth.', '2.', 'stir sugar into chocolate mixture until blended.', 'mix in eggs and vanilla.', 'stir in flour, baking powder, and salt.', 'stir in nuts (dough will be soft).', 'drop by rounded tablespoons onto ungreased cookie sheet.', '3.', 'bake: 12 minutes or until set.', 'do not over bake.', 'cool 5 minutes; remove from cookie sheet.', 'cool completely on wire rack.', 'store in airtight container.']
